race.comment: Wide open to finish the day with not much between a handful of them. FIORENOT (7) won two on the bounce prior to last start, just finding a well-riden TARVUE too hard to catch here last time. Prior to that, he'd run down AMBASSADORIAL (11) by a head who has since come out and won comfortably at Caulfield with an easy lead. FIORENOT might get a stronger pace to run at this time which could see him bounce back. SUNSETS (8) was given a good chance in the same race but just battled home into sixth. He can peak now fourth up and gets a key jockey change with Damian Lane going aboard, now a much bigger price than the others. XTRA RUSH (10) beat last week's G2 Autumn Classic winner Single Choice first up at Caulfield Heath to remain unbeaten. This is harder but we don't know his ceiling.
